name: Thomas Edison Service Area (NJ Turnpike)
description: Southbound New Jersey Turnpike service area at MM 92.9 in Woodbridge with a Sunoco fuel station (gas and diesel), a food court and truck parking. Rebuilt facility opened in 2019.

name: Grover Cleveland Service Area (NJ Turnpike)
description: Northbound New Jersey Turnpike service area at MM 92.9 in Woodbridge with a Sunoco fuel station, food court, Tesla EV chargers and truck parking. Rebuilt facility opened in 2015.

name: Vince Lombardi Service Area (NJ Turnpike)
description: Northernmost New Jersey Turnpike service area at MM 116 in Ridgefield near the GWB approach; a major truck stop with a large Sunoco fuel island, a food court and extensive truck parking. Open 24/7.

name: Pilot Express #1098 (Port Newark)
description: 24-hour Pilot truck stop in the Port Newark district off Turnpike Exit 15E, with 9 diesel/DEF lanes, roughly 33 truck parking spaces, showers, a CAT Scale and a convenience store.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot #1098 (Port Newark)
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the Pilot travel center on Doremus Ave in the Port Newark district, off NJ Turnpike Exit 15E. Open 24 hours.

name: Thomas Edison Service Area Truck Parking
description: Dedicated truck parking at the southbound Thomas Edison Turnpike service area, adjacent to the fuel island and food court.

name: Grover Cleveland Service Area Truck Parking
description: Dedicated truck parking at the northbound Grover Cleveland Turnpike service area, next to the Sunoco fuel island and food court.

name: Vince Lombardi Service Area Truck Parking
description: Large truck parking area at the Vince Lombardi service area near the George Washington Bridge approach, the northernmost Turnpike truck parking in NJ.

name: Port Newark Truck Parking
description: Secured, fenced and lit 8-acre truck and tractor-trailer parking yard off Doremus Ave in the Port Newark district, offering short-term, long-term and container storage with 24/7 access.

name: Inter City Tire & Auto Center
description: Large independent commercial tire dealer, retreader and heavy-duty truck repair facility at the Port Newark/Elizabeth Exit 13A off I-95, offering 24/7 road service.

name: O.J. Food Grade Tank Truck Wash
description: Food-grade tank, reefer and truck wash in South Kearny within about three miles of Port Newark, with nine dedicated wash bays open 24/7.

name: Tire Dose Mobile Truck Tire Service
description: 24/7 mobile commercial truck tire repair and replacement covering the Port Newark-Elizabeth marine terminal gates, the Turnpike and Newark, with 22.5 and 24.5 inch tires stocked on service vans.

name: B&L Recovery & Towing
description: New Jersey Turnpike-authorized heavy-duty towing and recovery operator serving the Newark/Elizabeth port district and the Turnpike 24/7, with locations including Newark and Carteret.

name: George's Truck & Tire Repair
description: 24/7 heavy-duty truck repair, tire service and truck towing serving Newark and the surrounding port/Turnpike corridor.

name: Red Roof PLUS+ Newark Liberty Airport - Carteret
description: Budget hotel near the New Jersey Turnpike (Exit 12) and Newark Liberty Airport that offers on-site truck and trailer parking for drivers.

name: Smith & Solomon Commercial Driver Training - Linden
description: Established CDL Class A/B training school in Linden near the NJ Turnpike, serving the Newark and Elizabeth area.

name: E-Z Wheels Driving School - Elizabeth
description: CDL and commercial driver training school in Elizabeth near Turnpike Exit 13 and the Port Newark-Elizabeth complex.
